description: Every Scrape Creators endpoint across 28 platforms, plus a local store with offline transcript search, cross-platform joins, and ad-library diffing no other Scrape Creators tool ships.

novel_features.name: Cross-platform presence matrix
novel_features.description: Given one handle, see which of 12 creator platforms (TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, Twitter, Threads, Bluesky, Pinterest, Twitch, TruthSocial, Snapchat, Kwai, GitHub) the handle exists on, with follower counts side-by-side.

novel_features.name: Multi-creator comparison
novel_features.description: Compare two or more creators side-by-side on follower count, engagement rate, and content volume.

novel_features.name: Engagement spike detector
novel_features.description: Surface the videos that performed far above a creator's own baseline — the ones that actually went viral.

novel_features.name: Transcript full-text search
novel_features.description: FTS5 full-text search across every transcript you've synced — YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, and Rumble.

novel_features.name: Trend triangulation
novel_features.description: Snapshot a hashtag or topic across platforms in one call to see which platform it's rising fastest on.

novel_features.name: Follower growth tracker
novel_features.description: Append a follower snapshot per run across every synced platform, then read the growth trajectory over time.

novel_features.name: Brand ad campaign monitor
novel_features.description: Snapshot a brand's live ads across Facebook, TikTok, Google, and LinkedIn ad libraries; on rerun, diff new ads vs. ones that disappeared.

novel_features.name: Credit burn projection
novel_features.description: See how fast you're spending API credits and how many days remain at the current pace, computed from the API's credit balance and daily usage history.
